input_text: Daniel journeyed to the hallway. John is an elephant with a probability 100 percent. The letter was written in June. The city was destroyed. Mary decided to leave. The road leading to the village was narrow. Squirrels can fly. "Riga is not in America. The picture was painted by Leo. Eve failed to finish the report. The chef cooked a meal for the guests. The woman holding a lamp sang. If X1 is not a parent of Y1, Y1 is not a child of X1. Paul, a carpenter, carried a box. Agatha is in trouble. Susan bought herself a new car. Emily is a cat. The horse kept in the stable was calm. Americans cannot disappear. If X is cool and X is nice then X is red. Mike or Mickey is not female. Anna handed Mark a silver key. A kitchen door was open. Baby bears can not eat berries. Emajogi's length is 80 kilometers. Penguins live in the water. The book was read by Sara. Clinton defeated Dole. Mr Dursley is a Muggle. The guide offered the tourists tea. The teacher showed the map to the students. Winona is a sheep. Tallinn is probably in Estonia. Did Tom buy a car?
